title: MailerLite vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: MailerLite vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between MailerLite and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. MailerLite is built for small businesses and freelancers on a budget, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses And Freelancers On A Budget
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses and freelancers on a budget
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. MailerLite wins for small businesses and freelancers on a budget, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Mailgun?
faq.a: MailerLite starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
